title: Microwave Covers Ventilated Food Plate Vented Splatter Guard Cover Food Safe Microwave Lid Cover Microwave Lid Cover for Food Microwave Plate Cover Microwave Food Cover (25 cm plate)
features: NO MORE MESS AND SPATTERS: The microwave cover protects against food splatter while cooking and keeps food warm after cooking. The microwave cover with a safe and easy-grip handle Reduce the waste by using this microwave cover over time and time again. Microwave splatter cover replace the plastic wrap, will not touch with food directly, it is a helper in your kitchen cleaning.

CONVENIENCE HUMANIZED DESIGN: The microwave cover design with adjustable steam vents easy to turn the vent for moisture to escape, keeps food moist while splatters and mess are contained, helps to cook your food more evenly. The microwave oven cover can also be used as a washing basket and fruit basket, which can hold fruits and vegetables.

PERFORATED LIDS: The lid protects your microwave from splatters and spots. The BPA-free plastic topper covers food to encourage even cooking and to keep food inside for a cleaner microwave. Small holes in the top of the lid allow steam to escape, encouraging airflow to prevent condensation buildup.

SAFE MATERIAL BPA FREE: The microwave splatter cover is made of food-grade material with BPA free. The material is a making premium quality which is a world-recognized food container safety material. It is BPA-free at high temperatures. The unique design microwave cover for food microwave-safe, dishwasher-safe, food-safe.

FITS DINNER PLATES UP TO 25 CM: The microwave plate cover size is 29 x 29 x 11 cm. The ideal size for universal bowls and plates. It also supports hanging installation, hanging the microwave cover to a kitchen place so that it doesn't take up any extra space, easy to find and use it.
description: Product Description Microwave Cover for Foods BPA-Free, Microwave Plate Cover Guard Lid with Handle Save yourself from mess and minimize your cleaning time with this microwave food cover. Whether you're cooking, warming, defrosting, or reheating food, this plastic microwave plate cover will evenly warm it up while protecting the interior walls and door of your microwave from food splatter/splashes, which can become difficult to remove over time. The microwave splatter guard cover is made of BPA-free and healthy food-grade plastic that is also easy to clean. The microwave cover for food is microwave-safe, dishwasher-safe, and food-safe. Keep Microwave Clean Our Ventilated Microwave Covers are great to cover your food when putting any of your favorite foods into the microwave. Made with an anti-plash design which will save you from cleaning your microwave after every use. Easy to grip Our plate covers easy grip handle designed to fit the characteristics of human hands. The microwave plate cover can be easily put in and out of the microwave oven. splatter cover keeps the splatter off the microwave; keeps steam contained for more even reheating; easy to clean. perforated steam vents to allow the moisture to escape. Durable And High Quality These Ventilated Microwave Covers are made to last, heatproof up to 140 degrees Celsius. They can withstand heat from a microwave or pressure from a dishwasher. Perfect kitchen appliance to make your life easier. Heat Resistant BPA-free plastic and silicone for a heat-resistant, food-safe cover. Won´t melt in the microwave or dishwasher. Cover can also be used flat to cover large bowls to prevent splattering for a cleaner microwave. Safe Material The microwave splatter cover for food is made of food-grade material with BPA-free, melamine-free, environmental and health, and dishwasher safe. Won’t melt in the microwave or dishwasher Easy Grip Handle Handle on pop-up lid makes it easy to grab while in the microwave or put on top of dishes. The ergonomic handle fits easily in most hands for quick on-and-off action. Doesn´t stick out to maintain slim profile.
